arts.ttl: Milan anxiously awaits Maignan’s fitness update ahead of derby against Inter
arts.sum: AC Milan are facing a tense situation regarding the physical condition of their goalkeeper, Mike Maignan. The French shot-stopper left the field in pain during the second half of the match against Liverpool, with the score at 2-1, due to a collision with teammate Tomori that caused a strong contusion to his right thigh. Moreover, before being substituted, Maignan had shown signs of muscle problems after a clearance, remaining on the field but appearing less than flawless for the goals scored by Konaté and Van Dijk. Calciomercato report how this marks the tenth physical issue Maignan has experienced since joining The post Milan anxiously awaits Maignan’s fitness update ahead of derby against Inter appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: How many goals has Erling Haaland scored in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Of Haaland’s contemporaries, Real Madrid striker Kylian Mbappé has scored more (49 in 74 matches) but has a significantly lower goals-per-game average (0.66) . The Norwegian striker drew a blank in the Community Shield against Manchester United, but has since scored nine goals in City’s opening four league fixtures, including back-to-back hat-tricks against Ipswich Town and West Ham United, as well as a double in his most recent appearance against Brentford.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola explains reasons behind Erling Haaland's electric goalscoring form
arts.sum: "I don't expect him to score two or three goals in every single game, it's not a problem because I know the quality is there, but the difference from last season is he feels good, no problems. After a record-breaking debut season in England, Haaland's numbers dropped slightly in 2023/24, scoring a comparatively disappointing 38 goals in 45 games.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Inter preview: Nerazzurri are a complete team, says Guardiola
arts.sum: City beat Inter Milan 1-0 with Rodri scoring the only goal of the game deep into the second half to secure his side's first-ever Champions League. Recalling the 2023 final Pep said: "It was a tight game.

arts.ttl: Players 'could REFUSE to play for England but carry on as normal with their clubs' insists PFA chief... after Man City star Rodri revealed they are 'close to striking' over hectic schedule
arts.sum: Players could strike for England but continue playing for their clubs according to the chief executive of the Professional Footballers' Association.

arts.ttl: LaLiga president Javier Tebas agrees with Rodri over potential player strike
arts.sum: The Manchester City star admitted players were close to striking over the gruelling fixture schedule, with FIFA's new 32-team Club World Cup adding to the problems

arts.ttl: Man City fire pointed message amid 115 charges hearing as Pep Guardiola proven right
arts.sum: Manchester City news as it remains business as usual at the Etihad Training Complex ahead of Inter despite 115 charges background noise

arts.ttl: Nick Cushing loves life at New York City FC but thanks to Pep Guardiola, the man who coached Cole Palmer as a kid can't rule out a return to England
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY LEWIS STEELE: Frown upon the City Football Group all you like, Manchester City's parent company has produced a stellar conveyor belt of elite coaches.

arts.ttl: Remembering Elano, Manchester City’s pre-takeover talisman
arts.sum: The international break spawned a social media phenomenon as the ‘Barclaysmen’ trend exploded in football circles. A name handed to players who understatedly helped define the ‘Barclays’ era, a period in which the bank sponsored England’s top flight in the early noughties and mid-2010s, Barclaysmen are not the superstars of the league but players who […] The post Remembering Elano, Manchester City’s pre-takeover talisman first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Football's crucial next steps after Rodri strike threat makes feelings clear to FIFA
arts.sum: Top-level players are growing increasingly irritated by fixture congestion with Manchester City midfielder Rodri admitting stars are close to striking over packed calendar
